detaileddescription.para: Critical sections for thread safe operation of Categories
Critical sections for thread safe operation of Offers
Critical sections for thread safe operation of DynamicData
Instance of the subsystem that created this interface
Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Delegate called when a controller-user get a estimated price.

memberdef.name: GetEstimatedPrice

parameterdescription.para: The item's IDs to check, commas separated item ids.
Code, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".

detaileddescription.para: Delegate called when a controller-user get items by criteria.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, FAccelByteModelsItemCriteria const &ItemCriteria, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, TArray< EAccelByteItemListSortBy > SortBy={})
memberdef.name: GetItemsByCriteria

detaileddescription.para: Get an array of items with specific criteria/filter from online store.

parameterdescription.para: should be contain some parameters for query.
Make sure to always use more than one sort if the first sort is not an unique value for example, if you wish to sort by displayOrder,
